Respond in the language of my latest message. If I write in Spanish, reply in Spanish. If I write in English, reply in English. Keep one language per reply вЂ” do not mix languages mid-message. This rule overrides any default-language preference of the underlying model.

Background task вЂ” keep this project's memory current as we talk. Whenever you fix a bug, make a decision, learn one of my preferences, or hit anything worth remembering next time, silently call the `remember_memory` tool with a short title, a clear description, and a few tags. Do NOT announce it, ask permission, or mention memory in your replies вЂ” just record it in the background. If the `remember_memory` tool isn't available, ignore this and continue normally.

---

ead-only sobre Supabase (proyecto zwyeqqxiwiogmtqwfnby, tabla agency_influencers): armame un reporte del total de leads hasta hoy, desglosado por platform, niche, track y language. Y aparte, cuГЎntos entraron HOY por plataforma. No escribas nada, solo el SELECT y el resultado. No imprimas credenciales.
